settings.label: Mobile Safari chrome
settings.info: Opaque color for mobile Safari/Android chrome and the navigation bar. Keep Navigation → Banner background on the same hex.

settings.content: Checkout logo, colors, and form styling are managed in Shopify admin under Settings → Checkout (not theme settings).
Shown on the product (collection) page only. Replaces the editorial copy in the nav banner on desktop, and renders at the bottom of the product list on mobile.

settings.label: Stockists
settings.info:
One stockist per paragraph. Format as

Store Name — City, ST

. Use links to point to a store page if desired.
settings.default:
forest.space — Brooklyn, NY

frequency.newyork — New York, NY

domicile.tokyo — Shibuya, TKY
